calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-04-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: K. Shaw, CSR: Vicki Gross.

Petitioner: Hugo Fernando Calderon, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Shellsie Judith Calderon Leverman, was sworn and examined. Ms. Mirna Salazar Leverman, mother of minor, was sworn and examined.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing. Minor's mother gives her consent to the name change. It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Shellsie Judith Calderon Salazar.

Decree signed in open court.
